rules.pattern: cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && echo "=== verify key files ===" && ls -la .claude/CLAUDE.md meal/README.md team/CLAUDE.md README.md .gitignore && echo "=== verify new directories ===" && ls -d meal/plans/daily/ team/memory/ team/code/ team/output/ team/backups/ 2>/dev/null

cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && echo "=== Top-level dirs ===" && ls -d */ .*/  2>/dev/null | grep -v '^\.$' | grep -v '^\.\.$' && echo "=== File counts by area ===" && echo "meal: $(find meal -type f | wc -l)" && echo "team: $(find team -type f | wc -l)" && echo "ppt-slide-formatter: $(find ppt-slide-formatter -type f | wc -l)" && echo ".claude: $(find .claude -type f | wc -l)"

cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && echo "=== Modified (M) ===" && git status --short | grep '^ M' | wc -l && echo "=== Deleted (D) ===" && git status --short | grep '^ D' | wc -l && echo "=== New (??) ===" && git status --short | grep '^??' | wc -l && echo "=== Total changed ===" && git status --short | wc -l
cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && git status --short | grep '^??' | head -30 && echo "..." && git status --short | grep '^??' | wc -l
cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && git status --short | wc -l && echo "=== sample changes ===" && git status --short | head -30
cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && rsync -a --exclude='.git' /tmp/tar_extract/ ./ 2>&1 | head -20 && echo "=== rsync done ==="

# Files only in repo (deleted in tar)
comm -13 /tmp/tar_files.txt /tmp/repo_all_files.txt

cd /tmp/tar_extract && find . -type f ! -path './.git/*' | sed 's|^\./||' | sort > /tmp/tar_files.txt && echo "tar files: $(wc -l < /tmp/tar_files.txt)" && echo "=== files only in tar (new/updated) ===" && comm -23 /tmp/tar_files.txt /tmp/repo_all_files.txt | wc -l && echo "=== files only in repo (not in tar) ===" && comm -13 /tmp/tar_files.txt /tmp/repo_all_files.txt | wc -l && echo "=== common files ===" && comm -12 /tmp/tar_files.txt /tmp/repo_all_files.txt | wc -l

cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && git ls-files -z | tr '\0' '\n' | sort > /tmp/repo_tracked.txt && git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -z | tr '\0' '\n' | sort > /tmp/repo_untracked.txt && cat /tmp/repo_tracked.txt /tmp/repo_untracked.txt | sort > /tmp/repo_all_files.txt && echo "tracked: $(wc -l < /tmp/repo_tracked.txt), untracked: $(wc -l < /tmp/repo_untracked.txt), total: $(wc -l < /tmp/repo_all_files.txt)"

cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && echo "=== files only in repo (deleted in tar) ===" && comm -13 /tmp/tar_files.txt /tmp/repo_all_files.txt | head -50 && echo "..." && comm -13 /tmp/tar_files.txt /tmp/repo_all_files.txt | wc -l

cd /tmp/tar_extract && find . -type f | sed 's|^\./||' | sort > /tmp/tar_files.txt && cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && (git ls-files; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard) | sort > /tmp/repo_all_files.txt && echo "=== files only in tar (new files) ===" && comm -23 /tmp/tar_files.txt /tmp/repo_all_files.txt | head -50 && echo "..." && comm -23 /tmp/tar_files.txt /tmp/repo_all_files.txt | wc -l
cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && git ls-files | sort > /tmp/repo_files.txt && wc -l /tmp/repo_files.txt
cd /tmp/tar_extract && find . -type f ! -path './.git/*' | sed 's|^\./||' | sort > /tmp/tar_files.txt && wc -l /tmp/tar_files.txt
mkdir -p /tmp/tar_extract && cd /tmp/tar_extract && tar xzf /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily/312959975957377024.tar.gz 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo "=== done ===" && ls -la
cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && tar tzf 312959975957377024.tar.gz | sed -n '700,900p'
cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && tar tzf 312959975957377024.tar.gz | grep '^\.zod' | head -20 && echo "---" && tar tzf 312959975957377024.tar.gz | grep '^\.kiro' | head -20
cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && tar tzf 312959975957377024.tar.gz | grep -v '/$' | awk -F/ '{print $1}' | sort -u

cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && tar tzf 312959975957377024.tar.gz | grep -c '^\.' && echo "---has .git?---" && tar tzf 312959975957377024.tar.gz | grep '^\.git/' | head -5 && echo "---has .claude?---" && tar tzf 312959975957377024.tar.gz | grep '^\.claude/' | head -5 && echo "---has .zod?---" && tar tzf 312959975957377024.tar.gz | grep '^\.zod/' | head -5

cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && git log --oneline -5 && echo "===working tree status===" && git status --short | head -5 && echo "..." && git status --short | wc -l && echo "===tracked file count===" && git ls-files | wc -l
cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && tar tzf 312959975957377024.tar.gz | sed -n '500,700p'
cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && git ls-files | wc -l && echo "---" && git ls-files | head -30
cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && git status --short | head -30 && echo "---total---" && git status --short | wc -l
cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && tar tzf 312959975957377024.tar.gz | sed -n '300,500p'
cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && tar tzf 312959975957377024.tar.gz | sed -n '100,300p'
cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && tar tzf 312959975957377024.tar.gz | wc -l && echo "---" && tar tzf 312959975957377024.tar.gz | head -100
cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && find . -maxdepth 2 -type d ! -path './.git*' ! -path './node_modules*' | sort
cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && tar tzf 312959975957377024.tar.gz | head -50
cd /Users/xpeng/Documents/daily && git log --oneline -20
